allow: PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "d:\\application\\Tavern\\mod\\世界书\\tavern_helper_template-main\\dist\\修仙状态栏\\index.html"; for \($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { $idx = $lines[$i].IndexOf\("100vh"\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Host "Line $\($i+1\) at $idx"; $start = [Math]::Max\(0, $idx-60\); $len = [Math]::Min\(160, $lines[$i].Length-$start\); Write-Host $lines[$i].Substring\($start, $len\); Write-Host "---" } })
